## Meeting Purpose

[Informal touchpoint with Gabrielle Sinacola, a strong candidate for the Chief of Staff role at GrowthX, to discuss the company, role, and Gabrielle's background.](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX, founded by Marcel, has rapidly grown to 30+ clients and $4M ARR in \~1 year, focusing on AI-enabled content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [The company is scaling quickly, with a lean team of \~20 people and plans to reach 100 accounts by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Gabrielle has relevant experience in content marketing, operations, and as a Chief of Staff, making her a strong fit for the role](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [The Chief of Staff role will focus on improving processes, managing people, and leveraging technology across business operations, client operations, and hiring](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Background and Growth

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, leveraging his experience in building organic content engines for companies like IBM and HP](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Started as workshops teaching AI-enabled content workflows, evolved into a service due to client demand](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Rapid growth: 30+ clients, $4M ARR in about a year](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Team of \~20 people, organized into pods (1 managing editor, 1-3 account managers per pod)](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Projecting growth to 100 accounts by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

### Chief of Staff Role and Responsibilities

  - [Focus areas: people, processes, and technology](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Key responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Improve and mature business processes](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Assist with staffing and hiring](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Explore technology and AI solutions for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [Support fundraising efforts](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Manage EAs and potentially support entire leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Immediate goals: Address pressing needs in business operations, client operations, and hiring](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Gabrielle's Background and Experience

  - [2 years at current company, looking for growth opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Previous experience as Chief of Staff, content marketing, and operations](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Currently in a growth role, managing marketing agencies and partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Experience in hiring, onboarding, and process implementation](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### GrowthX Funding and Future Plans

  - [Considering a small SAFE round in late January/early February](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Potential for more aggressive fundraising in the future](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining current client satisfaction while scaling](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to follow up shortly with next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Gabrielle to keep Marcel informed of any changes in her timeline or availability](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Continue moving the hiring process along as quickly as possible, given the urgent need for the role](https://fathom.video/share/2LyxqX3qJjNzAodDz2rTc_-bkAfyeQ6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
